case_title: MIKHAIL GOLOMB VS. FRANCESCA HOME OWNER ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,640.33 FILED BY GOLOMB, MIKHAIL AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCESCA HOME OWNER ASSOCIATION (C/0 CANYON PACIFIC MANAGEMENT) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FRANCESCA HOME OWNER ASSOCIATION (C/0 CANYON PACIFIC MANAGEMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MIKHAIL GOLOMB IS PRESENT. FRANCESCA HOME OWNER ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CHRISTOPHER STANLEY, MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-19-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCESCA HOME OWNER ASSOCIATION (C/0 CANYON PACIFIC MANAGEMENT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLOMB, MIKHAIL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FRANCESCA HOME OWNER ASSOCIATION (C/0 CANYON PACIFIC MANAGEMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
